Han Zhong (ÈüìÂø†). A member of the Yellow Scarves. Fought with Zhu Jun and Liu Bei at Wan, but was killed. Han Zhong was affiliated with Yellow Scarves. Han Zhong lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
